name: EBSTEIN ANOMALY

demographics.Associated with: ostium-secundum-type ASD / patent foramen ovale (R-to-L shunt), VSD,

distribution: distance of septal leaflet to anterior mitral valve leaflet:
discriminating_features: extreme RA enlargement ← insufficient tricuspid valve forming a common right

general: extreme RA enlargement ← insufficient tricuspid valve forming a common right
calcification of tricuspid valve may occur
distance of septal leaflet to anterior mitral valve leaflet:
> 15 mm in child < 14 years of age
> 0.8 mm/cm2 of body surface area = DIAGNOSTIC
MR: small right ventricle ± dilatation of RV infundibulum
large "sail-like" tricuspid valve structure within dilated right heart
tricuspid regurgitation identified by Doppler ultrasound

clinical.Prognosis: sudden death ← fatal atrial arrhythmia; 50% infant mortality; 13% operative
